Location: 9:9 - 12:5
Root: Effect.gen(function*() {\n    yield* Effect.succeed(a)\n    return b\n  })

      ==> [executes] -> [1]

      ==> [next] -> [2]

      ==> [yield*] -> [3]

      ==> [operand] -> [4]

      ==> [next] -> [5]
  [5] statement {unknown} return b
      ==> [returns] -> [6]
  [6] return {unknown} return
      ~> [returns value] -> [7]
  [7] returnOperand {plain A=string} b

=== Effect Flow ===

Location: 9:9 - 12:71
Root: Effect.gen(function*() {\n    yield* Effect.succeed(a)\n    return b\n  }).pipe(Effect.withSpan("withParameters", { attributes: { a, b } }))

      ==> [subject] -> [1]
